PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Suzanne McDonnell appeared by zoom for and with Constance Levi (by zoom) and for Laurence Levi.

The Court raised the issue about the will being executed five days before the Decedent died. Ms. McDonnell stated that Eva was in the hospital at the time the will was executed, that before Eva was hospitalized there were discussions of changes she wanted in her trust and in her will, and that Eva passed away in the hospital. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for September 27, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Continued To Jul-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
